hooks.prompt: Before allowing this git push, run the /pre-push skill: check which .liquid files are new in this branch (git diff --name-only --diff-filter=A origin/develop...HEAD or origin/main...HEAD) under blocks/, sections/, or snippets/. For each new file, check if a corresponding doc exists in docs/. If any meaningful feature is missing its doc, return ok=false and explain which files need documentation. If everything is covered or the new files are minor helpers, return ok=true.
